The IRGC Public Relations office stated that no commercial ships or oil tankers have passed through the Strait of Hormuz in recent hours.

It added that claims made by US officials are baseless and completely false, referring to a CENTCOM statement claiming that two US-flagged vessels have sailed through the Strait.

The statement further warned that any maritime movements violating the principles announced by the IRGC Navy would face serious risks, and offending vessels would be stopped with full force.

#Iran #StraitOfHormuz #UnitedStates #IRGC #AlMayadeen

US President Donald Trump announced the launch of “Project Freedom”, an initiative he described as an attempt to “guide stranded international vessels out of the Strait of Hormuz,” presenting the move as a  “humanitarian effort”.  

In a post on Truth Social, Trump said the operation responds to requests from neutral countries whose ships remain trapped amid the ongoing standoff, stressing that many crews are facing deteriorating conditions.  He described the effort as a gesture of goodwill, in particular on behalf of Iran, while also noting ongoing “positive discussions” with  Tehran. However, no official Iranian response has been issued so far.  

The announcement comes as a fragile ceasefire holds between the two sides, alongside continued US naval restrictions and stalled negotiations, with Trump warning that any interference with the operation would be met “forcefully”.

As fuel prices continue to climb amid the US war on Iran, many Americans are being forced to cut back on daily spending and adjust their lifestyles.

A poll conducted by The Washington Post, ABC News, and Ipsos found that 44% of Americans are driving less because of rising gas prices, while 42% said they have reduced household spending. Another 34% reported changing or canceling travel and vacation plans.

The shift comes as the national average price of gasoline reached $4.43 per gallon on Saturday, according to AAA, compared to $3.15 per gallon during the same period last year.

#WarOnIran #UnitedStates #Oil #OilPrices #Trump #AlMayadeen
